name: Hamburger Cookies
recipeIngredient: 6 Chocolate-covered round mint cookies or patties
recipeInstructions:
1. For each hamburger cookie, spread 1/2 teaspoon of frosting on the flat side of one vanilla wafer.
2. Place a teaspoon of coconut and one mint cookie on the frosting.
3. Spread the flat side of the second vanilla wafer with 1/2 teaspoon frosting; place it frosting side down on the mint cookie.
4. Brush the top of the "hamburger" with honey.
5. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
6. Repeat to make 5 more cookies.
Recipe can be doubled or tripled easily.
